anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1118: Luffy vs. Imu Showdown Teased
anime_pulse_items.summary: Eiichiro Oda drops a bombshell in the latest chapter, hinting at the final war with Imu. Fans are analyzing every panel for clues about the One Piece treasure. Expected anime adaptation in Fall 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: New Live-Action Series Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix and Japanese producers reveal a new Death Note live-action series set in modern Tokyo. Casting rumors include global stars. Anniversary merchandise drops on May 20.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto: Boruto TBV Chapter 15 – Kawaki's True Power Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Boruto: Two Blue Vortex chapter 15 shows Kawaki unlocking a new ability that rivals Isshiki. Fans debate the future of the Uzumaki family. Next chapter on June 1.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball DAIMA Episode 18: Goku's New Form Stuns Fans
anime_pulse_items.summary: Dragon Ball DAIMA introduces 'Super Saiyan 4 Divine' as Goku battles the Demon Realm's final boss. Episode breaks Crunchyroll records with 2 million concurrent viewers.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 Trailer: Culling Games Arc Unleashed
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA drops a 2-minute trailer for Jujutsu Kaisen season 3, featuring Yuji vs. Sukuna final battle hints. Premieres July 2026 on Crunchyroll. Trailer gets 5 million views in 2 hours.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle Movie Breaks Box Office Records
anime_pulse_items.summary: Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle earns $50 million in its opening weekend in Japan, becoming the highest-grossing film of 2026. International release set for June. Ufotable's animation praised.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Chapters Post-Finale Drama Continues
anime_pulse_items.summary: Isayama releases a new 'School Caste' spin-off chapter, exploring an alternate universe where the Survey Corps are students. Fans divided over canonicity. Manga sells 500k copies in first week.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Chapter 420: Deku's Final Stand Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: My Hero Academia enters its final arc with Deku vs. All For One. Horikoshi confirms manga ends in 10 chapters. Fans speculate on character deaths. Weekly release on Viz.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2 Release Date Confirmed for October 2026
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA announces Chainsaw Man season 2 will premiere on October 3, 2026. New teaser shows Denji and Asa in the 'Justice Devil' arc. Crunchyroll to stream globally.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Movie 2: 'Operation Strix' Teaser Released
anime_pulse_items.summary: The second Spy x Family movie gets a teaser trailer, hinting at the family's biggest mission yet. Voice cast returns. Release date December 2026. Promotional art trends on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren Season 2 Announced: Beyond Journey's End Continues
anime_pulse_items.summary: Madhouse officially announces Frieren season 2, covering the 'Goddess's Monument' arc. Premieres January 2027. Season 1 wins Anime of the Year at 2026 Crunchyroll Awards.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2: Jeju Island Arc Gets First Trailer
anime_pulse_items.summary: A-1 Pictures releases a stunning trailer for Solo Leveling season 2, adapting the Jeju Island Raid. Fans hype over Jin-Woo vs. Ant King. Premieres July 2026 on Crunchyroll.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Announces Summer 2026 Simulcast Lineup
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll reveals 40+ new titles for Summer 2026, including 'The Rising of the Shield Hero S4', 'Mob Psycho 100: Season 3 OVA', and exclusive 'Oshi no Ko' season 2. Schedule released.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Cast Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix unveils new cast for One Piece live-action season 2, including actors for Chopper and Robin. Filming begins June 2026. Fans react to Chopper's CGI design.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit r/anime Discusses Best Anime of 2026 So Far
anime_pulse_items.summary: A massive thread on Reddit's r/anime debates the top anime of 2026, with 'Frieren', 'Dungeon Meshi', and 'Solo Leveling' leading. Over 10k comments. Poll shows Frieren as favorite.

anime_pulse_items.title: Kodansha Manga Awards 2026: Winners Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: The 48th Kodansha Manga Awards name 'Frieren' as Best Shonen, 'The Witch Hat Atelier' as Best Shojo, and 'Blue Lock' as Best General. Ceremony trends on social media.

anime_pulse_items.title: New 'Sailor Moon' 30th Anniversary Project Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: Toei Animation announces a new Sailor Moon anime project for 2027, celebrating 30 years. Key visual released. Fans speculate on a reboot or sequel. Merchandise line announced.

anime_pulse_items.title: Mappa Announces 'Jujutsu Kaisen' x 'Chainsaw Man' Crossover Game
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA and CyberConnect2 reveal a crossover fighting game featuring characters from Jujutsu Kaisen and Chainsaw Man. Release set for 2027. Trailer shows Yuji vs. Denji.
